title: peucedanum brachytaenium
intro: Peucedanum brachytaenium, also known as a species of fern-like umbelliferous plant, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been shown to possess antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Peucedanum brachytaenium are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Peucedanum brachytaenium, such as teas and infusions, can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water.
